test.note: 818/819 tests pass. 1 failure is known pre-existing flaky test (GET /api/health-data > audit events > emits data.viewed audit event) documented in AGENTS.md as non-blocking.

highlights: Old schema files (oura-connections.ts, health-data.ts) still exist as dead code
Some test files still import legacy aliases (healthData, upsertHealthData)
Missing FK on health_data_series.user_id to users(id)
Partition range starts 2024-01 vs LLD spec of 2020-01
Adapter fetchDailyData sets userId to empty string (caller must override)
Category headings display lowercase instead of capitalized (deferred to UI milestone)
No adapter cache reset function for testing
Module-time env var evaluation for APP_URL
getStateSecret() duplicated in authorize and callback routes
MOCK_AUTH_SECRET used for both session and OAuth state JWTs
Middleware regex only allows [a-z] for provider names
Silent fallback for missing provider in state JWT
Source resolution queries all metric types instead of just requested ones
Types endpoint makes 3 sequential DB queries (could parallelize)
isValidUuid duplicated across 6+ route files
Source filtering in post-processing after decryption (inefficient for large datasets)
Stuck syncing state if connection deleted between claim and fetch steps
Inaccurate step.run() counters in token-refresh due to retry semantics
sql.raw() with template literal interpolation in partition-ensure
Missing per-provider concurrency limit on syncInitial
Triple auth decryption per sync cycle
Fire-and-forget initial sync dispatch
Minor comment inaccuracy on sleep duration
Verbose sourceIds for period data
Single-batch upsert for periods vs per-day for series

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: Legacy schema aliases (re-exporting new names under old names in barrel exports) should be considered temporary. Workers should update imports to use canonical new names. Old dead-code schema files (e.g., oura-connections.ts, health-data.ts) should be deleted once all imports are migrated.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features mpb-schema-migration and mpb-provider-system both used legacy alias re-exports as a bridge. Multiple test files (upsert.test.ts, shares/route.test.ts, health-data/route.test.ts, viewer/route.test.ts) still import old names. The old schema files are dead code.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: Utility functions duplicated across 3+ route files (e.g., isValidUuid, getStateSecret) should be extracted to shared utilities in src/lib/. Workers should check for existing duplicates before adding inline helpers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: isValidUuid is duplicated in 6+ route files (audit, viewer/data, shares, health-data, series, periods). getStateSecret is duplicated in authorize and callback routes. Both were flagged in multiple reviews (mpb-api-health-data, mpb-api-connections).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: MetricCategory values are lowercase machine-format strings (e.g., 'sleep', 'cardiovascular'), not display-ready. UI components must capitalize for display. This changed from the MVP's PascalCase convention.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mpb-provider-system changed MetricCategory from PascalCase to lowercase per LLD. MetricSelector renders raw lowercase. Future UI workers need to know this.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: The 'queued' sync status value is used when the API dispatches an Inngest event. The Inngest function then transitions to 'syncing' via claimConnection(). This 'queued' → 'syncing' → 'idle'/'error' lifecycle is the standard pattern for all background sync flows.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mpb-inngest-sync introduced sync_status='queued' set by the sync API before dispatching Inngest events. This is an important new state value not in the original schema enum definition.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to 'Known Pre-Existing Issues': MOCK_AUTH_SECRET is used for both session JWT signing and OAuth state JWT signing. When real auth is introduced, these should be split into separate secrets.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mpb-api-connections review found MOCK_AUTH_SECRET used in middleware.ts (session), authorize/route.ts (OAuth state), and callback/route.ts (OAuth state).

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker suggested backend-worker skill should note that seed scripts are exceptions to the 'write tests first' procedure.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a valid point but too granular for the skill file. The existing 'write tests first' guidance already allows reasonable exceptions. Workers can use their judgment.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker suggested backend-worker skill should clarify that manual verification (curl) is only needed for API route features, not library/config features.
rejectedObservations.reason: The skill already implies this by saying 'test the endpoint(s)' — the 's' and article make it clear this applies when there are endpoints. No change needed.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker suggested feature descriptions should avoid overlapping scope with preconditions (re: upsert functions in mpb-provider-system already done by mpb-schema-migration).
rejectedObservations.reason: This is an orchestrator planning concern, not a convention or skill change. The orchestrator already handles feature scoping.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker suggested documenting deprecated type aliases strategy in AGENTS.md.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already covered by the broader legacy alias suggestion above. Separate entry not needed.
